content.scenarioHint: 我下周不在，你能帮我接客户电话吗？
expectedAnswers: I'll be out next week, so can you cover my client calls?
When I'm away, can you take care of my client calls?
I'll be out next week, can you help me with my client calls?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词正确
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 员工提出请求，经理作为服务方回应
expectedAnswers: 你打算如何处理工作的状态？
你会把文件和更新状态放在哪里？
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确表达了询问文件存放位置的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词正确
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: I'm heading out for a week-long conference. Can you monitor the team’s progress reports?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要去参加为期一周的会议，你能帮忙监控团队的进度报告吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course. Can you share the latest template and who to contact if there are issues?
I’ll keep an eye on them. Just let me know if there’s anything urgent.
I can help, but I’ll need access to the reporting system first.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应请求并提出合理需求
是否使用交接场景关键词（monitor, share, access, update）
是否语言流畅、逻辑清晰，体现专业责任感
